summary: Pre-position the d=8-boundary action plan for the 8 April-EOM PREDs (PRED-077,-081,-085,-087,-088,-090,-106,-111). At d=8 (~2026-05-08T00Z), trigger application IF predictions.html is still byte-identical AND all 8 still labeled PENDING-PROSPECTIVE. Branched by HOLD #13 outcome (~07:30Z 2026-05-04).
detail: Per chg-20260503-2306-003 (Step 10b day-4-7 lapse-specific) the 8 April-EOM PREDs (PRED-077 M2 Honolulu; -081 JWST z<0.1 SNe; -085 S-wave shadow zone; -087 GRACE geoid low stationary; -088 second geoid low 70°N 135°W; -090 NH TOA flux excess >0.3 W/m²; -106 16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR; -111 mascon 30°S 60°E) all closed 2026-04-30T23:59Z and as of 2026-05-03T23:06Z poll are at d=3.96 past close with ZERO dome-side adjudication across 6 consecutive polls. Live verification at this analyst run (2026-05-04T05:23Z): predictions.html md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785/152936 (28 byte-identical polls / ~14d), all 8 still 'class="prediction pending"' + 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' badge. d=8 boundary hits 2026-05-08T00Z (~3.8d from this proposal); per Step 10b, d=8 is HIGH severity and triggers analyst migration of verdicts to silent_ignore. This proposal pre-positions the application plan; nothing is applied this run. Two precedents structure the d=8 actions: (a) FAIL-010/PRED-072 — predictions with substantive scientific verdicts (standard_physics, recycled) keep their our_verdict and add a FAIL-NNN entry to data/uncounted-failures.json marking the dome's silent-window behavior; (b) FAIL-009/PRED-105 — predictions with our_verdict='pending' advance through silent_ignore at d=8 → tacit_withdrawal at d=14, with FAIL-NNN tracking the bookkeeping. The 7 standard-verdict PREDs follow precedent (a); PRED-106 (currently pending) follows precedent (b).
trigger_condition_d8: 2026-05-08T00:00Z OR LATER, AND predictions.html still byte-identical (md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785/152936), AND all 8 PREDs still labeled 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' on predictions.html, AND no PASS/FAIL/REFINED in any subsequent commit-message or daily_review.json regen between now and that boundary.
trigger_condition_d14: 2026-05-14T00:00Z OR LATER, AND PRED-106 still labeled PENDING-PROSPECTIVE, AND no dome adjudication intervened. Applies ONLY to PRED-106 (precedent b).
fallback_if_dome_acts_before_d8: If HOLD #13 (~07:30Z 2026-05-04) or any subsequent HOLD or manual edit produces a dome-side adjudication for any of the 8 PREDs (PASS/FAIL/REFINED/removal/window-extension), THIS PROPOSAL'S PLAN IS DISCARDED for that PRED. Re-assign that PRED to analyst Mode 1b for verdict update against the actual dome outcome.

hold_13_decision_branch.branch_a_registry_updates: Gate released. Hypothesis qualified to 'gate is held intermittently'. Adjudication batch in same window plausible. If 8 EOM PREDs get bucket assignments, this proposal's plan is discarded (or partially discarded for the PREDs that did get adjudicated). Analyst Mode 1b on each adjudicated PRED.
hold_13_decision_branch.branch_b_registry_held: 4th consecutive gated HOLD. Manual-approval-gate hypothesis hardens to near-certainty. This proposal's d=8 plan stays queued.

seven_standard_verdict_preds.verdict_change: NONE — keep our_verdict (6x standard_physics, 1x recycled for PRED-090).
seven_standard_verdict_preds.new_fail_entries: Allocate FAIL-011 through FAIL-017 (or next-available IDs) in data/uncounted-failures.json. Each entry: dome_label='PENDING-PROSPECTIVE (silent ignore)', dome_ref_type='prospective_prediction', what_actually_happened='Silent ignore: prediction window expired with no outcome reported.', outcome populated with dome silence duration and consecutive-byte-identical-poll count, summary one-liner, evidence_date set to d=8 boundary date, needs_reconciliation=true. Use FAIL-010 as template.
seven_standard_verdict_preds.analyst_handoff: Analyst will write the per-PRED FAIL-NNN entry text in a follow-up dispatch IF the d=8 trigger fires AND predictions.html state is still as predicted. This proposal does NOT include the entry text — it is intentionally text-deferred so the entry reflects actual conditions at d=8.

pred_106_pending_verdict.d8_action: Advance our_verdict from 'pending' → 'silent_ignore'. Update verdict_history with from='pending', to='silent_ignore', at=d=8 timestamp, reason='Window closed 2026-04-30; dome silent across N consecutive byte-identical predictions.html polls; Step 10b day-8 boundary reached', related_artifacts=[this proposal id, FAIL-NNN]. Add FAIL-NNN to data/uncounted-failures.json analogous to FAIL-009 silent_ignore stage.
pred_106_pending_verdict.d14_action: If PRED-106 still PENDING-PROSPECTIVE on dome at 2026-05-14T00Z, advance our_verdict 'silent_ignore' → 'tacit_withdrawal'. Update verdict_history. Mark FAIL-NNN classification='tacit_withdrawal'. Mirror EXP-284 / PRED-105 advancement pattern.
pred_106_pending_verdict.analyst_handoff: Analyst Mode 1b run when verdict is set to null OR via assigned-analyst issue, with verdict_history preserved.

recommended_decider_actions: READ this proposal at the next decider run.
OPEN an issue ISS-NNN with category='failure-tracking-staging', status='monitoring', tracking the d=8 trigger and the 8 PREDs.

DO NOT apply changes now. Hold the issue open until either (a) d=8 trigger condition is met (poller flags + analyst confirms) and analyst writes per-PRED FAIL entries, or (b) HOLD #13 / subsequent dome action invalidates the trigger for one or more PREDs.
WHEN d=8 trigger fires for a given PRED: route to analyst Mode 1b (PRED-106) or to analyst-singleton FAIL-NNN allocation (the 7 standard verdict PREDs).
counter_considerations: Pre-positioning at d=4 risks premature commitment. Mitigation: this proposal STAGES the plan, applies nothing. Application is conditional on the trigger condition.

Treating 8 PREDs as a single batch risks losing per-prediction nuance. Mitigation: the d8_action_plan has two paths (7 standard-verdict; 1 pending-verdict) and per-PRED FAIL entries will reflect each prediction's specifics.

If HOLD #13 releases the gate, we will look slow if we waited until d=8. Mitigation: this proposal explicitly branches on HOLD #13 outcome — if the gate releases, analyst Mode 1b takes over for any adjudicated PRED.

PRED-090 'recycled' verdict may not have a clean restates_win pointer (current notes show null in our run-time check). Mitigation: analyst will verify the recycled-source WIN at d=8 entry-write time and either confirm or down-grade to standard_physics.
Dome could choose to mass-adjudicate at d=8+ as a batched 'cleanup' move (similar to a stale-PR sweep). If so, this plan accommodates by discarding pre-positioned drafts when dome publishes outcomes.
